mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals strengthening final demand and higher expected corporate revenues; when RSAFS growth is positive, S&P 500 returns are predicted to be positive over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot RSAFS 433907.0 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or has Rank IC below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals weakening household income and recession risk; when UNRATE crosses above its 6-month moving average by at least 0.2 percentage points, S&P 500 returns are predicted to be negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above its 6-month moving average by at least 0.2pp
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot UNRATE 6.7 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean at p <= 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: A declining federal funds rate lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows; when FEDFUNDS falls over the prior 3 months, S&P 500 returns are predicted to be positive over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS decreases by at least 0.25pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot FEDFUNDS 0.08 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day forward returns after 3-month FEDFUNDS declines are not higher than returns after FEDFUNDS increases, or if the sign test is positive in less than 52% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in industrial production indicates falling real output and pressure on operating leverage; when INDPRO declines for two consecutive months, S&P 500 returns are predicted to be negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for two consecutive monthly observations
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot INDPRO 101.6276 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if two-month INDPRO contractions are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of triggered cases or if downside hit-rate is not above baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent payroll weakness and unemployment increases identify a labor shock that reduces consumption and earnings expectations; when PAYEMS falls and UNRATE rises over the same 3-month window, S&P 500 returns are predicted to be negative over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is negative and UNRATE rises at least 0.3pp over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot PAYEMS 137928.0 and UNRATE 6.7 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-down and UNRATE-up condition does not produce lower 60-day returns than either condition alone, or if triggered mean return is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts lead cyclical construction activity and durable-goods demand; when HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average after a 3-month decline, S&P 500 returns are predicted to be negative over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its 12-month moving average after declining over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot HOUST 907.0 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST breakdowns are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if average triggered return exceeds the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation acceleration combined with restrictive policy compresses equity valuations through higher discount rates and margin pressure; when CPIAUCSL inflation rises while FEDFUNDS also rises, S&P 500 returns are predicted to be negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized inflation increases and FEDFUNDS rises over the prior 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot CPIAUCSL 235.64 and FEDFUNDS 0.08 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL-up and FEDFUNDS-up condition does not underperform periods with only one condition active, or if 20-day return Rank IC is above -0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth captures broad demand momentum; when GDPC1 growth over the latest reported quarter is positive, expected earnings growth dominates macro risk and S&P 500 returns are predicted to be positive over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest reported quarter-over-quarter growth is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest snapshot GDPC1 15942.3 available before decision date
failure_condition: Reject if positive reported GDPC1 growth is followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of observations or if event-window average return is not above zero.
